    print(''Has graph key:'', ''graph'' in data)
    graph = data[''graph''][0]
    print(''Has graphid:'', ''graphid'' in graph)
    print(''graphid:'', graph.get(''graphid''))
    
print(''\n--- apiTest provides models as ---'')

print(''So the value being passed to StaticGraphMeta(v) has the graphid'')

Bash(python3 -c "
import json

with open(''/home/philtweir/Code/alizarin/tests/data/models/Group.json'') as f:
    data = json.load(f)

Group = data[''graph''][0]
print(''Group has graphid:'', ''graphid'' in Group)
print(''Group.graphid:'', Group[''graphid''])

models = {}
models[Group[''graphid'']] = Group
print(''\nAfter models[graphid] = Group:'')
print(''models has key:'', Group[''graphid''] in models)
print(''Value has graphid:'', ''graphid'' in models[Group[''graphid'']])
")
